news.t: Aberdeen Investments Expands Active ETF Suite with Fixed Income and International Small Cap

overview.description: The Abrdn Ultra Short Muncipal Income Active ETF (AMUN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF that seeks high after-tax current income while preserving capital by investing primarily in investment grade, tax-exempt municipal bonds with a portfolio duration of two years or less. AMUN was launched on Mar 17, 1986 and is issued by aberdeen.

data.title: Aberdeen Investments Expands Active ETF Suite with Fixed Income and International Small Cap
data.text: U.S. ETF suite surpasses $18 billion AUM1 PHILADELPHIA , Oct. 20, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- Aberdeen Investments, the U.S. arm of the global specialist asset manager, today announced the expansion of its a...
